name: Bc Linux Smoke Planning Seed
brief: Seeds two BC companies with multi-year history for planning-optimizer pipeline smoke.
description: Test-only AL app that builds PLANOPT-CO-A and PLANOPT-CO-B with ~100 items each, 36 months of postings, regime-change cohort, stockout cohort, and open documents — the dataset consumed by scripts/test-pipeline.sh. Per ADR 0013.
